name: Shopify Polaris
license: MIT (modified) - use limited to apps that interoperate with Shopify and are visually distinct from Shopify products
unsuitable_contexts: non-Shopify apps that mimic Shopify's look
strengths: documented motion duration and easing design tokens
weaknesses: license is a modified MIT: grants are limited to Shopify-interoperating apps that stay visually distinct from Shopify products
brand assets restricted; adapt motion tokens/principles only, treat guidance as reference-only
